findings.summary: Authored PROP-014-amendment-001.json with answers to 6 operator clarifying questions
findings.evidence: monitor/tinker/proposals/PROP-014-amendment-001.json (JSON-validated; 6 questions, each with tinker_answer + design_impact + files_to_modify_in_prop_014_if_authorized fields)

answer_summary.Q1_C16_alerts_txt: Decision: (b) defer with disprove condition. alerts.txt is curmudgeon→operator (human consumer) with timestamp inline; staleness is normal timestamp semantics, not a ledger lie. Mech 4 contingent spec provided in disprove path.
answer_summary.Q2_C17_predictions_verdict: Decision: (i) cite-the-bullet with boundary clarification. C17 is covered by Mech 2 (read-side) + Mech 3 (write-side prose); Mech 1b does NOT extend to predictions.json verdicts because the verification primitive (test -f implied artifact) doesn't apply. Boundary clarification recommended for PROP-014.
answer_summary.Q3_mech_3_measurement: Decision: (i) hybrid. Three-stage automation: Stage 1 paragraph-citation gate (HARD AUTOMATABLE, 0% uncited threshold), Stage 2 anchor-match (PARTIAL AUTOMATABLE, ≤2% mismatch), Stage 3 LLM-judge sample (cheap Haiku call, ≥90% YES). Mech 3 worth shipping with this stage stack. New script: monitor/scripts/audit-narrative-citations.js.
answer_summary.Q4_parallelize_triggers: Three triggers (T1 active bug surfaces, T2 zero-signal, T3 >3 weeks calendar) + middle option (Mech 3 always parallel with current step). Diagnostic blur != forfeit — bug-class-to-mechanism attribution preserved across parallel rollouts.
answer_summary.Q5_mech_2_scope_table: Eight read-sites enumerated (RS-a through RS-h). In-scope: RS-a (decider new critical), RS-b (decider re-flag critical), RS-f (tinker PROP verification), RS-g (decider tracker reads). Out-of-scope: RS-c (curmudgeon chained reviews), RS-d (decider prose narration — Mech 3 territory), RS-e (analyst Mode 2b — self-verifying), RS-h (curmudgeon priority-queue — covered by PROP-009r2). One soft watch on RS-e.
answer_summary.Q6_claudemd_exception: Exact replacement text drafted for CLAUDE.md File Ownership Rules section. Eight fields enumerated (status, completed_at, completed_by_run, prop_id_authored, amendment_file_authored, progress, superseded_reason, superseded_at) with per-field idempotency rules and read-side guard. Mirrors PROP-009 additive-edit exception structure.

findings.operator_action_required: Operator reviews the amendment. On authorization, design_impact + files_to_modify_in_prop_014_if_authorized fields fold back into PROP-014 (edit-in-place or PROP-014-r2). Path C implementation continues as planned (operator implements Mech 2/1b/3, tinker authors verify-pending-state.js + audit-narrative-citations.js + workspace-sync integration in a separate follow-up directive after amendment lands).
